label: NK cell
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) consistently refers to 'NK cell' as 'Natural Killer cells' in prenatal and adult human skin single-cell transcriptomic data. The UMAP visualization (Fig. 1e, Extended Data Fig. 1) labels 'NK cell' among the immune lineages in the integrated prenatal and adult skin dataset. Supplementary Tables S1-S3 link the cluster label 'NK' to Natural Killer cells. NK cells are identified in both prenatal and adult skin compartments of the atlas.
